title: lonicera dioica subsp. glaucescens
intro: Lonicera dioica subsp. glaucescens, also known as the Chinese honeysuckle, is a plant species within the honeysuckle family native to the Himalayan region and parts of Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lonicera dioica subsp. glaucescens include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
